title: Asuka on the beach tangent split
display_title: Asuka on the beach tangent split
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by King_Panther13 » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:04 am (If this was already mentioned, I apologize, and please delete this post. I'm too tired to check, and I just want to put the idea out before I forget about it) I think Asuka came out of the sea because she didn't like being with other people....didn't like living with them. It has nothing to do with Shinji loving her.....but I will agree that anybody can come back when they want to come back(and they want to really badly, at that). Asuka wanted to come back, not just to exist, but to not be with the likes of other people. The reason that I'm saying this is, I was just watching 22'....and I heard Asuka say the "I feel sick" line when mentioning being with Shinji and Misato. Or maybe the "I feel sick" is signifying that she doesn't like being back, and it was involuntary.....I don't know. I'm just tossing the idea out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:49 am That sounds completely contridictory. Anyways she didn't really know what she wanted, case in point: ep #25 wrote: Asuka (OFF): I'm going to live on my own! I don't need Mom or Dad. I'm going to live by myself. I'm not going to cry anymore. But I'm still crying... Why am I crying? ------------- Asuka: That's why I'm going to live by myself. But I don't want to! It's hard! I don't want to be alone! I don't want to be alone! I don't want to be alone!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 16, 2007 12:57 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Anyways she didn't really know what she wanted, case in point:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 16, 2007 1:25 pm Mr. Tines wrote: King Panther's suggestion fits quite well with my own model that she emerged so that she would be able to die.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 16, 2007 2:12 pm BrikHaus wrote: sachiel_13 wrote: cant start humanity over again with 2 Adams, its gotta be and Adam and Eve , and Asuka was the most likely Choice

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:11 pm @SSD: Wrong thread for the "Post-3I" stuff. Re: Asuka kicking down the gravemarker: Um, I was always under the impression Shinji kicked it down because he was pissed off that she didn't return. <snip>

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:13 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: when Yui, Adam and Lilith all CLEARLY STATE THAT OTHERS CAN RETURN ?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:20 pm Mr. Tines wrote: It's another of the rejected endings, like the severed arm, where she turns up and kicks it over.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:42 pm ay, if Asuka had a wish to die (such as in 24' during her Roman Bath suicide attempt),

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:48 pm She didn't attempt suicide. There are no cuts on her wrists or any other signs of self-inflicted trauma. My impression from that scene is that she had simply lost the will to do anything, including killing herself.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jul 16, 2007 3:55 pm See http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3093 for analysis of relevant shots (in OA, Video/LD, and Renewal) and further discussion. Basically, 2 sides: The red streaks that were added into the DC was blood and there was a continuity error (lack of scars) in ep25' OR The red streaks added was really nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Jul 16, 2007 4:00 pm As intricate a series as Eva is, I really don't think a contiunity error of that magnitude would have slipped by them.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Jul 16, 2007 4:16 pm I thought the blood was of her menstruating

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 16, 2007 4:18 pm shinesman_cobalt wrote: a continuity error of that magnitude

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 16, 2007 4:54 pm Reichu wrote: Unlike the arm, however, the kicked-over gravemarker is actually there in the final version.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jul 18, 2007 3:47 pm Mr. Tines wrote: If you've been there yourself, you'll know what she means, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 18, 2007 4:18 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Question for Mr. Tines: What evidence is there, according to you, that Asuka DID want to die in the Final Scene?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jul 18, 2007 4:37 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The fact that we didn't see this:-
